---
title: Week notes (2026-W28)
date: 2026-07-10
date-modified: today
categories:
  - week notes
---

- Progress on analysis
- Working on a proposal for the 2nd Canadian Open Science Conference [data challenge](https://carn-recar.ca/2nd-canadian-open-science-conference-call-for-proposal-canadian-metaresearch-data-challenge/): https://zackbatist.info/CMDC/
